title: Kling 3.0 Motion Control in ComfyUI
text:
Kling 3.0 Motion Control in ComfyUI
Keep your character's face perfectly consistent — across every angle, emotion, and motion.
Daxiong (Lin)
and
Eric Solorio
Mar 06, 2026
10
1
Share
We’re excited to announce that
Kling Motion Control 3.0
is now available via Partner Nodes in ComfyUI!
Building on the acclaimed Kling 2.6 Motion Control, this upgrade introduces
Element Binding
— a new facial consistency system that keeps your character's face stable and recognizable across every angle, emotion, and occlusion in the generated video.
Try on Comfy Cloud
Key upgrades:
Facial consistency from any angle
— stable features and smooth expressions even in complex, multi-angle, or long-duration motion
Accurate complex emotions
— upload multiple face reference images to improve expression fidelity across your character’s full emotional range
Face restoration through occlusions
— hats, fans, hands, and other partial obstructions no longer breaks character identity
Steady clarity during camera movement
— face quality stays consistent as the camera zooms, pans, or tracks
Examples
Getting Started
Update ComfyUI to the latest version or visit
Comfy Cloud
Search for the
“Kling Motion Control”
node
Prepare your reference image and reference motion video, and run the example workflow
